scripts.install:all: npm run install:ui && npm run install:python
scripts.dev:core: python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --reload-dir services/core-backend --reload-dir data --port 8001 --app-dir services/core-backend
scripts.dev:ai: python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --reload-dir services/ai-backend --reload-dir data --port 8002 --app-dir services/ai-backend
scripts.test:python: npm run test:core && npm run test:ai
